text.title: Retrieval Drift Alerting — Output Contract
text.summary: Schemas for the three production artefacts: drift-alerts.yaml (config), baseline snapshot (parquet metadata), and Prometheus rule output.

forbidden.pattern: baseline.window_start within 14 days of now — too fresh, captures the drift it's meant to detect
metrics map has < 4 entries — incomplete coverage
routing.p1_destination == routing.p3_destination AND both go to the same pager — alarm fatigue by design
safer_mode.degrade_behaviour requires manual approval for a P1 — too slow
recontract_triggers empty OR contains "manual review every quarter" — must be event-based
baseline auto-refreshed on a cron without operator approval

allowed-transformations.transformation: Tighten thresholds after a low-noise period (≤1 false-positive per month for >3 months).
Add new metrics (e.g. retrieval-coverage-of-queries) without removing the four required ones.
Adjust suppression_window_min upward to reduce noise from transient infrastructure events.

list.item: All four metrics defined with both P1 and P3 thresholds
Baseline window ≥14 days AND not auto-refreshed
Routing splits P1 and P3 to different destinations
Safer-mode auto-engages on P1; no manual gate for the degradation
At least one recontract trigger references the acceptance contract
Prometheus rules match the schema; dashboard panels show all four metrics
